mapper.sql: select c.company_record_id, c.external_company_id, c.external_company_name, c.number_prefix, c.org_path, c.parent_external_company_id, c.sync_status, c.first_seen_time, c.last_seen_time, c.last_source_dept_id, d.dept_name as last_source_dept_name, m.dept_id as mapped_dept_id, md.dept_name as mapped_dept_name, c.remark, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time from fe_external_company c left join sys_dept d on c.last_source_dept_id = d.dept_id left join fe_company_dept_mapping m on c.external_company_id = m.external_company_id left join sys_dept md on m.dept_id = md.dept_id
